# Agent Labs — Agentic AI by Vibe Technologies

> Agent Labs is where Vibe Technologies LLC builds agentic AI products: market data infrastructure for AI agents, OpenClaw agentic browser framework, AI-native hedge fund tooling, and multi-agent browser automation.

## Products

- [Agents Data & Alerts API](https://agentlabs.cc/agentsdata): Real-time stock and crypto prices, RSI/SMA/MACD indicators, and programmable price alerts via MCP server, HTTP REST API, and CLI. Designed for AI agents. MIT licensed, self-hostable. GitHub: https://github.com/dzianisv/mkt-alerts. Live API: https://mkt.agentlabs.cc.
- [Vibe Co-Pilot](https://agentlabs.cc/): AI-powered browser automation. Chrome extension or standalone Chromium browser. Natural language control for any website. Any LLM, including local AI. Teams and enterprise editions with SSO and TEE security.
- [Vibe Agentic Team](https://agentlabs.cc/agentic-team): Multi-agent AI system over Slack. Specialized agents collaborate with defined roles, tools, and context windows. Configurable for any workflow.
- [VibeBrowser Cloud](https://agentlabs.cc/cloud): Chrome DevTools Protocol MCP server in the cloud. Deploy Chrome instances globally. Connect AI agents to real browser sessions over HTTPS.
- [OpenCode Manager](https://github.com/dzianisv/opencode-manager): Mobile-first PWA for managing OpenCode AI agents. Git integration, file manager, real-time chat.
- [Opencode Mobile](https://agentlabs.cc/opencode-mobile): iOS/Android app for self-hosted OpenCode AI coding agents. Streaming, diffs, tool approval, biometric unlock.
- [QuantArena](https://quantarena.xyz): Live leaderboard for AlphaVibe, an AI-native hedge fund. Multi-model trading arena, live P&L charts.

## Market Data API — Quick Reference

The AgentLabs Market Data service exposes three integration paths:

**MCP (Model Context Protocol)**
Add to any MCP-compatible agent (Claude Desktop, Cursor, VS Code):
```json
{"mcpServers": {"market-data": {"command": "mkt", "args": ["mcp"]}}}
```
Callable tools: get_quote, get_rsi, get_macd, get_sma, set_alert, list_alerts.

**HTTP REST API** (Bearer token auth)
- GET /quotes/:symbol — real-time price + indicators
- POST /alerts — create a price/indicator alert
- DELETE /alerts/:id — remove an alert
- GET /notifications — fired alert history
- GET /subscribe — ntfy.sh push notification URL

**CLI**
```bash
npx -y @vibetechnologies/mkt-alerts subscribe
npx -y @vibetechnologies/mkt-alerts add --symbol BTC-USD --condition below --value 90000
npx -y @vibetechnologies/mkt-alerts list
```

Alert conditions supported: above, below, pct_up, pct_down, rsi_above, rsi_below, sma_cross_above, sma_cross_below, macd_cross, volume_above.

## Pages

- [Home](https://agentlabs.cc/): Agent Labs company page. Full product portfolio.
- [Market Data](https://agentlabs.cc/agentsdata): Market data and alerts API for AI agents.
- [Agentic Team](https://agentlabs.cc/agentic-team): Multi-agent Slack automation.
- [Cloud](https://agentlabs.cc/cloud): VibeBrowser Cloud — agentic browser infrastructure.
- [Blog](https://agentlabs.cc/blog): Technical blog on agentic AI, browser automation, and AI infrastructure.

## Open Source

- mkt-alerts (MIT): https://github.com/dzianisv/mkt-alerts — Market data + alerts server and CLI
- opencode-mobile (MIT): https://github.com/dzianisv/opencode-mobile — Mobile app for OpenCode
- opencode-manager (MIT): https://github.com/dzianisv/opencode-manager — Web UI for OpenCode agents
- VibeBrowserProductPage: https://github.com/dzianisv/VibeBrowserProductPage
